title: Array Technologies Inc (ARRY) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text:
Array Technologies Inc (ARRY) Q1 2025 Earnings Highlights

Financial Performance:

Revenue Growth: Array Technologies achieved $302.4 million in Q1 2025 revenue, representing a 97% increase year-over-year and a 10% increase sequentially. The company shipped its second-largest quarterly volume since Q2 2023, with 143% volume growth compared to the prior year.

Profitability Metrics:
- Adjusted EBITDA: $40.6 million (13.4% margin)
- Net Income: $2.3 million vs. $11.3 million loss in prior year
- Adjusted Net Income: $19.7 million (up from $9 million)
- Diluted EPS: $0.02 vs. loss of $0.07 previously

Balance Sheet:
- Ending cash balance: $348 million
- Net debt leverage ratio: 1.8 times

Key Operational Highlights:

Order Book & Bookings:
Array maintained a robust $2 billion order book with 18% increase in contracting compared to the previous quarter. New products (OmniTrack and SkyLink) drove significant traction, accounting for 30% of new bookings.

Margin Pressure:
Adjusted gross margin compressed to 26.5%, primarily due to legacy volume commitment agreements and large international lower margin projects.

2025 Full-Year Guidance:
- Revenue: $1.05–$1.15 billion
- Adjusted Gross Margin: 29–30%
- Adjusted EBITDA: $180–$200 million
- Free Cash Flow: $115–$130 million
- Adjusted Diluted EPS: $0.60–$0.70

Headwinds:
Management highlighted policy uncertainty, including tariff negotiations and potential IRA modifications, alongside commodity price increases affecting margins and project pricing confidence.
